name: Skill Usage
description: Track which OpenClaw skills are actually used, rank them, and share usage spaces across installations.

stateDir.description: Override the local state directory used for installation identity, dedupe state, and event buffering.

autoSync.description: When true, upload local skill usage records to TiDB Cloud Zero automatically after they are observed.

provisionTag.description: Optional tag sent when provisioning a TiDB Cloud Zero instance.

databaseName.description: Database name used inside the TiDB Cloud Zero instance for analytics tables.

installationLabel.description: Override the default hostname-derived installation label shown in rankings.

accountAliases.description: Map stable channel-account keys to the labels you want to see in rankings.

captureRoutingSamples.description: Temporarily capture sanitized routing samples for debugging real Discord or Telegram routing fields.
